key.name: show-end-notification
key.description: Display a notification when the Do Not Disturb timer expires and notifications are re-enabled.

key.name: show-timer-subtitle
key.description: Show the timer end time in the quick toggle subtitle when DND is active with a timer.

key.name: remember-state
key.description: Remember the DND state across sessions and reboots. If DND was on when you logged out, it will be re-enabled on next login.

key.name: show-toggle-notification
key.description: Show a notification when Do Not Disturb is manually enabled or disabled.

key.name: timer-durations
key.description: List of timer durations in minutes shown in the dropdown menu. Set a value to 0 to hide that slot.
